case_title: STEPHANIE ADRAKIAS RESPONDENT VS. EDWIN H. CLOCK DBA CLOCK INVESTMENT APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF SEP-11-2003. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND PRESENT TESTIMONY - JUDGMENT FOR THE PLAINTIFF FOR $175 PLUS $57.00 COSTS; TOTAL:$232.00; JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER N. HADIARIS; CLERK: DANIAL LEMIRE.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADRAKIAS, STEPHANIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWIN H. CLOCK DBA CLOCK INVESTMENT $175.00 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $232.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
